scores.correctness_notes: The agent provides Python API usage but the gold standard explicitly notes that charmlibs docs cover interface/data schemas (application-data, unit-data fields), not library Python API. The agent completely omits the data schema which is the actual answer. Uses v2 while gold standard recommends v1.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several unverifiable items: strip_prefix parameter, scheme parameter, is_ready() method, on.ready/on.revoked event names, self.ingress.url property — none confirmed in gold standard. Also contains a confused/garbled statement: 'use IngressPerAppRequirer with IngressPerUnitRequirer from the same library instead' which doesn't make sense. port=self.app.planned_units() is an odd/wrong usage.
